name: ai-governance-skills
description: Claude Code skills for AI Governance — EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001, NYC Local Law 144, South Korea AI Basic Act, and Brazil AI Act.

plugins.name: eu-ai-act
plugins.description: Expert EU AI Act (Regulation 2024/1689) compliance advisor — risk classification, high-risk gap assessment, conformity assessment, FRIA generation, GPAI obligations, and technical documentation.

plugins.name: nist-ai-rmf
plugins.description: Expert NIST AI Risk Management Framework advisor — organizational profile assessment, AI risk identification, playbook action guidance, trustworthy AI characteristics mapping, and gap assessment.

plugins.name: iso42001
plugins.description: Expert ISO/IEC 42001:2023 AI Management System advisor — gap assessment, AISIA, AI risk assessment, SoA generation for 38 Annex A controls, policy generation, and certification readiness.

plugins.name: nyc-local-law-144
plugins.description: Expert NYC Local Law 144 compliance advisor — AEDT determination, bias audit planning and report generation, candidate notice requirements, and compliance gap assessment.

plugins.name: south-korea-ai-act
plugins.description: Expert South Korea AI Basic Act compliance advisor — high-risk AI classification, obligations by role, impact assessment, transparency compliance, and gap assessment.

plugins.name: brazil-ai-act
plugins.description: Expert Brazil AI Act (Marco Legal da IA) compliance advisor — risk classification, rights of affected persons, governance system design, obligations by role, and gap assessment.
